steps.title: Write the time equation
steps.content:
The variables $x$ and $y$ are both times in hours. The total driving time is $6$ hours, so
$$x+y=6$$

steps.title: Write the distance equation
steps.content:
Distance equals rate times time. The highway distance is $60x$, and the local-road distance is $45y$. The total distance is $330$ miles:
$$60x+45y=330$$
The answer is B.
